style: Premium horizontal dark fantasy title logo: obsidian metal, aged silver-gold bevels, restrained ember accents, no cheap neon.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: Korean-first title must match the moonlit ruined kingdom start background and avoid Diablo imitation or cheap mobile-banner glow.

prompt: Generate exactly one premium horizontal dark fantasy game title logo. Canvas: very wide 4:1 horizontal logo, transparent alpha background. Visible text must be exactly Korean main title: 검은계약 용병단: 잿빛 왕국. Visible English subtitle must be exactly: Black Contract Company: Ashen Kingdom. Make it look expensive and restrained, not a mobile banner: obsidian carved metal Korean letters, aged silver-gold bevel, fine ash scratches, small ruined crown covenant crest integrated above the center line, very subtle blood-wax contract seal, moonlit steel rim light, tiny ember accents only. Thin elegant horizontal silhouette; no tall plaque, no large shield, no big spikes, no oversized frame. It must blend over a dark moonlit ruined kingdom campfire background.
acceptance: The visible Korean title is exactly 검은계약 용병단: 잿빛 왕국.
The visible English subtitle is exactly Black Contract Company: Ashen Kingdom.
The logo is a runtime WebP generated from Image2 source art and normalized to 1280x360.
The title reads as premium dark fantasy metal over the gothic ruined kingdom start background.
